tasks.description:
Resolve FGAP-115: ExtensionContext.currentModel / currentProvider gap. Three options surfaced in FGAP-115 body need to collapse to one canonical choice before agentic-mode dispatch (FEAT-001) can land. Precondition for the entire implementation arc.

RESOLVED 2026-05-30: collapse to canonical resolution = option (d) — DEC-0001 as-written is implementable via ctx.model + ctx.modelRegistry exposed at node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/dist/core/extensions/types.d.ts:217-219. FGAP-115's empirical premise was wrong; the field exists under name 'model' (not 'currentModel' as the original grep searched for). FGAP-115 closed in .project with closing-citation + VER-067 attests (project:VER-067). TASK-002 (agentic-mode dispatch loop in jit-runtime.ts) unblocked: precondition was illusory; the dispatch loop can consume ctx.model + ctx.modelRegistry directly per DEC-0001.

Implement FEAT-001 agentic-mode dispatch loop in jit-runtime.ts:432-738 per MODE-002 spec. Depends on TASK-001 (FGAP-115 resolved). Closes FGAP-169 + FGAP-178; enables formal closure of FGAP-102 via real-LLM demo.
Implement FEAT-002 list-dispatch-models Pi tool + CLI dual-surface. Independent of TASK-002 (can land in parallel; no dep on agentic-mode). Closes FB-007 / FGAP-158.

Implement FEAT-003 call-agent structured-return + zero-token detection. Depends on TASK-002 (agentic-mode dispatch contract defines structured-return semantics). Closes FB-009 + FB-015 / FGAP-160 + FGAP-165.
Implement FEAT-004 agent-trace + inspect-agent + query-agent-dispatch Pi tools. Independent of TASK-002/004 (read-only introspection). Closes FB-016 / FGAP-166.

Implement FEAT-005 author-agent-spec correctness arc (resolvePromptField narrowed + YAML newline preservation + round-trip validation + oneOf discriminator + model-registry pre-validation). Depends on TASK-003 (list-dispatch-models exists for FB-005 model pre-validation). Closes FB-001..006 / FGAPs 153/154/155/156/157.
